tr.td: Cholesterol in LDL [Mass/volume] in Serum or Plasma by Direct assay
Cholesterol in HDL [Mass/volume] in Serum or Plasma

tr.th: Conclusion and Recommendations based on this report and previous findings known to us

tr.td: The patient shows mildly elevated HbA1c, suggesting impaired glucose control or prediabetes. Creatinine is slightly high, indicating possible early renal impairment. LDL cholesterol is elevated and HDL is low, increasing cardiovascular risk. Chloride is marginally above normal but likely not clinically significant. Recommend further evaluation of glycemic control, renal function, and lipid management.
Cholesterol in LDL [Mass/volume] in Serum or Plasma by Direct assay
